# Dependency Mapping

## Purpose
Use this skill to identify upstream and downstream dependencies and impact paths.

## Triggers
- "blast radius"
- "service dependency"
- "downstream impact"

## Outputs
- Dependency map summary
- Impacted services list
- Critical path candidates
- Containment options

## Example Prompts
- "Map upstream and downstream impact for cache-cluster degradation."
- "Estimate blast radius if payment-gateway dependency times out for 15 minutes."
